mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.code, p.cover, p.name, p.address, p.budget_amount AS "budgetAmount", COALESCE(used_amount.used_amount, 0) AS "usedAmount", p.status, p.current_phase AS "currentPhase", p.health_status AS "healthStatus", p.pause_reason AS "pauseReason", p.cancel_reason AS "cancelReason", p.planned_start_date AS "plannedStartDate", p.planned_end_date AS "plannedEndDate", p.actual_start_date AS "actualStartDate", p.actual_end_date AS "actualEndDate", p.created_by AS "createdBy", p.updated_by AS "updatedBy", p.created_at AS "createdAt", p.updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM project p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, SUM(amount) AS used_amount FROM payment_request WHERE status = 3 GROUP BY project_id ) used_amount ON used_amount.project_id = p.id
AND p.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.code}, '%') AND p.code LIKE '%' || #{params.code} || '%'
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.name}, '%') AND p.name LIKE '%' || #{params.name} || '%'
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
